page_metadata.biotools__summary: CLAIRE stands for Constrained Large Deformation Diffeomorphic Image Registration. It is a C/C++ software package for velocity-based diffeomorphic image registration in three dimensions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CLAIRE stands for Constrained Large Deformation Diffeomorphic Image Registration. It is a C/C++ software package for velocity-based diffeomorphic image registration in three dimensions.
